name: llm-usage-tracker
description: Local macOS menu bar tracker for Codex and Claude Code subscription usage

scripts.install:mac: npm run package:mac && (pkill -f '/Applications/LLM Usage.app/Contents/MacOS/LLM Usage' || true) && rm -rf '/Applications/LLM Usage.app' && cp -R 'out/LLM Usage-darwin-arm64/LLM Usage.app' '/Applications/LLM Usage.app' && open '/Applications/LLM Usage.app'
